_meta.notes: Plugin-owned profile for UiPath.Persistence.Activities. Registered via plugin_loader.register_version_profile(). Ground-truth XAML is NOT harvested — templates are omitted (harvestable=false) because Studio IPC harvest is a follow-up. Activity list mirrors what uipath-tasks/extensions/generators.py emits.
